title: How a QR Code Standard Could Revolutionize How We Pay
excerpt: In this Bank Business News article, Matera Co-Founder and CEO Carlos Netto explores how implementing a standardized QR code payment system could transform both
body: In this Bank Business News article, Matera Co-Founder and CEO Carlos Netto explores how implementing a standardized QR code payment system could transform both bill and everyday payments. He explains how QR codes, paired with instant payment rails like FedNow and RTP, can streamline user experiences by enabling push-based, low-fee transactions and unlocking richer loyalty programs for merchants. Netto underscores the critical role of the X9 QR Code Working Group in developing interoperability standards, laying the groundwork for a more efficient and scalable payment ecosystem.
